title: Onboarding - What's new screen - Updating from previous app version
scenario: "Welcome to Poly Studio" onboarding screen does not appear after app update from pre-5.0.0.X version
steps: 1. Install an older version of Poly Studio Mobile (pre-5.0.0.X) on the device.
2. Launch the app and complete any initial setup.
3. Update the app to the latest version (5.0.0.X or newer).
4. Launch the updated Poly Studio Mobile app.
5. Observe the screen that appears after launch.
6. Tap the "Get Started" button on the "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen.
expected: The "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen appears right after launch. Tapping "Get Started" dismisses the screen and brings the user to the Home Screen.
